summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is addressed via a new useReplaceInventoryItem hook and updated Excel import logic in InventoryPage.tsx that uses item ID as the stable key. REQ-2 is addressed by renaming the button labels to 'Unggah' and 'Unduh' in InventoryPage.tsx.

hallucinated_features.description: Import result dialog now shows both 'added' and 'updated' counts separately, beyond just a success count
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only required updating existing items by ID and adding new ones. A separate 'updated' counter displayed in the UI was not requested.
